title: Deep zero problems and the HRT conjecture
author_string: Yufei Li, Zeguang Liu, Kehe Zhu
abstract: We investigate a "deep zero problem" proposed by Hedenmalm. We show that there is a natural connection between Hedenmalm's problem and the classical HRT conjecture in time-frequency analysis. This connection allows us to show that Hedenmalm's problem 5.2 in [5] as well as some of its natural analogs have affirmative answers.
